title: Ondo City, Ondo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Ondo City is a city in Ondo with a population of 490,000. The historic capital of Ondo Kingdom, an agricultural and commercial center in southwestern Nigeria.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
